name: Utility & Secondary Actions
description: How secondary features should support the shopping experience without distracting from the primary purchase goal

heuristics.principle: Save, wishlist or compare features should be available without competing with the primary action
checkpoints: Wishlist/save option is present but secondary
Compare feature is accessible if relevant
Secondary actions use subdued visual treatment
Primary CTA remains the dominant action

heuristics.principle: Gifting options should be present on the product page when relevant
checkpoints: Gift option is available for appropriate products
Gift wrapping or messaging options are accessible
Gift purchase flow is clearly indicated
Registry or gift list add options are present if applicable

heuristics.principle: The page should avoid unnecessary distractions that pull users away from the purchase decision
checkpoints: Promotional banners do not dominate the page
Exit intent or email capture does not interrupt purchase flow
